title: TY-CGS4 Cuddle GLOWERS-Baby Bear-Pink
features: Light activates when hugged or lightly shook
Colour changes 12 Soft mood Colour variations
description: Product Description London Europe has over 15 years of experience in producing Feature Plush Toys, from Who let the Dogs out in 2003 by Sony Music. To Bear Direction 2015. The Music I.C. chips are synced with clever robotic movements to create a magical effect. All our Plush Toys carry Music and are sold across the country into National Retailers and Independents. Great care is taken in our product range to create a perfect gift for your loved ones and no corners are cut. All our toys come with batteries included. All Our Plush toys are tested to the latest EU safety standards. (Incorporating Cuddle barn products). Safety Warning not appropriate for children under the age of 3 Box Contains 1 x item See more
